headline.name: Game Design
headline.context: Systems design, progression loops, ability frameworks, and the spreadsheet authoring tools that keep them maintainable. Currently lead designer on Calamity VR's class/ability systems at Highstreet.

headline.name: Product Design
headline.context: A decade of product and brand work before games — wireframes, design systems, stakeholder reviews, the engineering handoff. The muscle that makes the game-design work ship on time.

headline.name: Unity + C#
headline.context: Daily driver since 2021 — Unity 6 with DOTS and Meta XR on Calamity, traditional Unity stack on jam entries. Gameplay systems, editor tooling, data-driven authoring, the gap between ECS and OOP.
